hero.subtitle: WITH LOVE AND GRATITUDE
hero.title: OUR UNION
hero.tagline: United in love, spirit, and purpose

quote.text: Two souls that choose each other every day to walk together with love, respect, and purpose. We honor our roots, nature, and spirit, and today we decide to unite our paths in commitment and ceremony.
quote.author: — Spirit of the Amazon

story.title: Our Story
story.description: A sacred place where the river embraces the jungle and the spirit of nature guides us. We unite our lives in this site of profound power, giving thanks to Pachamama, the medicine teachers, and all the beings who accompany us on this path.
story.mariaDesc: From Ica, she arrived in Tarapoto and found her home in the jungle, where the connection with Ayahuasca and nature became part of her daily life and soul.
story.jasonDesc: Ayahuasca healer (maestro), ceremony and healing guide, who has dedicated his life to serving with love, humility, and respect to the medicine and the community.
story.jointSpace: Together we have created a sacred space in Estero del Río Mayo for ceremonies, healing, and transformation.

ceremony.title: The Ceremony
ceremony.subtitle: Our Sacred Day
ceremony.timeDetail: Arrival and spiritual preparation starting from 9:00 AM
ceremony.locationDesc: Playa de Estero del Río Mayo
ceremony.dressDetail: Earth tones · Cream · Gold · Emerald green
ceremony.dressWarning: Flowy fabrics · No dark colors, please
ceremony.giftNote: We would love to share this sacred moment with you. Your presence is our greatest gift.

elements.title: Sacred Elements
elements.subtitle: Plants of Power
elements.ayahuascaDesc: Bridge between worlds, ancestral wisdom, and healing.
elements.chacrunaDesc: Protection, clarity, and vision of the heart.
elements.bobinsanaDesc: Heart opening, sweetness, and true love. Calm your mind, open your heart.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: Will you join us?
rsvp.namePlaceholder: Write your first and last name
rsvp.yes: Yes, I will attend with love
rsvp.no: No, I cannot attend, I will be with you in spirit
rsvp.whatsappTextTemplate: Hello Jason and María! I confirm my attendance at your Shamanic Wedding Ceremony. Name: {name}. Attendance: {attendance}. Message: {message}
